name: Baked Vanilla Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Unsalted butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together all-purpose flour and salt. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in butter until evenly distributed and the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
2. With a fork, lightly mix in granulated sugar. Add the large egg and enough ice water to form a dough. Press into a ball, wrap in foil or plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. On a floured surface, roll out dough to fit a 10-inch (25 cm) flan tin with a removable bottom. Place the dough in the prepared tin without stretching it.
5. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Stir in vegetable oil, granulated sugar, egg yolks, cornstarch, and pure vanilla extract. Gradually add whole milk until well combined.
6. Beat the egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cream cheese mixture.
7. Pour the filling into the prepared pastry shell. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Turn off the oven and let the cheesecake cool inside with the door slightly open.
9. Remove the cooled cheesecake from the tin and serve.
